titleStmt.title: SII 24.203: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 203. (A.R. No. 89 of 1938-39.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: The inscription commences with the historical introduction Samasta jagadādhāra etc. and purports to be an order issued at the request of the king by the god. States that the administration of the temple was hitherto conducted by a body of ten persons belonging to the Kōvaṇavar kottu. (King) Sundara-Pāṇḍya is said to have defined the activities of the temple, made gifts as aḍukkaḷaippuṟam for maintenance of the kitchen, instituted services, gilded the vimānas like the Śrīraṅga-vimāna as also Sundara-Pāṇḍiyaṉ-madiḷ and the gōpura, made duplicate sets of ornaments for the god, constructed a palanquin (śivigai) and presented several other articles made of gold. A representative committee from all the groups (kottus) was constituted, two from Kōvaṇavar, two from Śrīraṅgamaṟaiyōr, one from Tōdavattut-tūmaṟaiyōr, two from Taḻaiyiḍuvār, one from Vāśal-āriyar and two from Aṟaṭṭamukki-aṇukkar for managing these benefactions. The inscription is attested by the Royal Secretary Kaṇṇuḍaiyāṉ Pallavaṉ Viḻupparaiyaṉ of Puduchchēri and is said to have been engraved at the instance of Śrīraṅganārāyaṇadāsan Māttūrkiḻavaṉ Kurukulattaṟaiyaṉ, the manager of the temple, the Kōvaṇavar and the Kuḍavar.
The record bears the same regnal year as the previous one but is dated a month later.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ . svasti samasta
jagadādhāra somakula
tilaka madhurāpurimādhava
keraḷa vamśanirmmūlana la
ṅkādvipaluṇṭana dvitiyarāma
coḷakula śaila kuliśa karṇāṭa
rājavidrāvaṇa kāṭhakakarikūṭapākala
vividharipudurggamarddana virakaṇṭhagopāla vipi
nadāvadahana kāñcipuravarāthīśvara gaṇapatiha
riṇa śārddūla nelruRead nellūru puraviracita virābhiṣeka
praṇatarāja pratiṣṭhāpaka mahārājādhirāja
śrī koccaṭappaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkara
vattikaḷ śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yā
ṇṭu pattāvatu puraṭṭāti mātam
koyil tiruppati śrī vaiṣṇavarkaḷ
kottil patimu ceytu ponta Itu AṉaRead aṉaittu
ttuk kottukkaḷilumāka Iṭṭu kāriyaṅ
kaḷ kuṟaiyaṟa naṭattuvatāka perumāḷ tiru
mukam varukaiyāle Ippaṭikku perumāḷukku
viṇṇappañ ceytu ceytapaṭikku Iṭṭaruḷi
ṉa niṉaippukku kalveṭṭu . tiruppaḷḷi Aṟai
yil pūpālarāyaṉ siṅhāsanattu nāccimā
roṭum Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu ceyya tiruvāy
moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi . nam viṭṭuk kāriyaṅ
kaḷum Aṭukkaḷaippuṟak kāriyaṅkaḷum nā
mukanta viṭukaḷum toppukkaḷum kāriyaṅ
kaḷum nammuṭaiyar kāriyaṅkaḷum nam vi
ṭṭuk kovaṇavar kottile pattup
perāy Ārāyntu ponta Itukku nam sundara
pāṇṭiyaṉ namviṭṭu kāriyaṅkaḷ vi
riya Iṭṭu Aṭukkaḷaippuṟaṅkaḷum tantu
lvikaḷum kaṇṇālamumā koyil
śrīraṅgavimānam mutalāṉa
pala vimānaṅkaḷum sundara
pāṇḍyan matiḷum kopura
mum poṉ mevittu nama
kku pūṇa Orupaṭiyāka Ā
bharaṇaṅkaḷum Eṟac civikaiyum
ccikaiyum pala poṟpaṇikaḷum
ceyvikkaiyāle Ivai nokka
kāriyaṅkaḷ ceyyumiṭattu Aṉaittu
kkottukkaḷilu muḷḷārile pattup
perāy niṉṟu nokkic ceyvatāka niśca
yittu Ippaṭikku taṉ Olai varakkāṭṭiṉa
ṉeṉṟum Itukku muṉpu kāriyaṅkaḷ cey
tu ponta kovaṇavarkaḷ kottile Ira
ṇṭu perum nam bhaṭṭakaḷ śrīraṅgamaṟaiyor
kottile Iraṇṭu perum nam sabhaiyār
totavattu tūmaṟaiyor kottile Oru
perum nam taḻaiyiṭuvār kottile Ira
ṇṭu perum vācal Āriyar kottile Oru
perum pūntoṭṭam ceyyum Aṟaṭṭamukki
Aṇukkar kottile Iraṇṭu perum Āka
pattup perāy niṉṟu kāriyaṅkaḷ Ārāyntu
kuṟaiyaṟa naṭattuvarkaḷākavum . Ippaṭikku
Ivarkaḷukku nam Olaikaḷum puṟappaṭṭuk kal
veṭṭak kaṭavatākavum peṟa veṇumeṉṟu
nam śrī raṅganārāyaṇadāsaṉum viṭṭukkā
riyam Ārāykiṟa māttūr kiḻavaṉ kurukulat
taraiyaṉum viṭṭuk kovaṇavarum kuṭava
rum namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭikaḷ
ceyyakkaṭavatākavum paṇṇi Ippaṭikaḷu
kku nam Olaikaḷum Eḻutikkuṭuttu kalveṭṭik
koḷḷavum paṇṇuka Eṉṟu tiruvāy moḻintu
Aruḷiṉapaṭikku tirumantira Olai nāya
kam putucceri Uṭaiyāṉ kaṇṇuṭai
yāṉ pallavaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ
Eḻuttu .§
Digital edition of SII 24.203 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
